data.title: The crypto sector stabilized slightly, while BTC and ETH fluctuated within a narrow range
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, the US stock market was closed and the situation in the Middle East was tense, the market wait-and-see sentiment heated up, and the crypto market stabilized and rebounded slightly. Among them, Bitcoin (BTC) rose 0.24% in 24 hours, fluctuating in a narrow range around $104,000. Ethereum (ETH) rose 0.64%, maintaining above $2,500. In addition, the PayFi sector rose 0.54%, eCash (XEC) and Bitcoin Cash (BCH) rose 5.46% and 8.58% respectively.
Other bright spots include: Layer1 sector rose 0.42% in 24 hours, TRON (TRX) and Solana (SOL) rose 0.73% and 0.96% respectively; RWA sector rose 0.34%, Pendle (PENDLE) and Plume (PLUME) rose 3.94% and 6.63% respectively; CeFi sector rose 0.18%, Gate (GT) and OKB rose 7.39% and 10.63% respectively.
In addition, the DeFi sector fell 0.17% in 24 hours, but Uniswap (UNI) rose 3.73%; the Layer2 sector fell 0.20%, and Mantle (MNT) rose again by 3.32%; the Meme sector fell 0.42%, and the AI ​​sector fell 1.64%, but Fetch.ai (FET) rose 2.09% in 24 hours due to factors such as the Fetch Foundation's announcement of a $50 million FET token repurchase.
The crypto sector index, which reflects the historical market conditions of the sector, shows that the ssiPayFi, ssiLayer1, and ssiMAG7 indexes rose 0.73%, 0.51%, and 0.42% in 24 hours, respectively.

data.title: Bitwise CEO: “Regulatory uncertainty” is no longer the biggest obstacle for Bitcoin investors
data.description: Hunter Horsley, CEO of Bitwise, said in a post on the X platform that in the past, "regulatory uncertainty" was the biggest obstacle for Bitcoin investors. In 2025, the situation is completely different. This is a huge change, but the impact on the market has not yet fully emerged. In addition, there are two problems with Bitcoin investment at present: first, most investors and asset allocators are very busy and have no time to pay attention to Bitcoin due to too many opportunities (including other assets that may rise 10 times); second, gold is indeed one of the least popular investments in the United States. Some family offices do not invest in gold, so they do not pay attention to Bitcoin, which is called "digital gold."

data.title: Tether CEO: Open Source Password Manager PearPass to be Launched Soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Paolo Ardoino, CEO of stablecoin issuer Tether, posted on the X platform that 16 billion login credentials of online service providers such as Apple, Google, and Facebook were leaked, and cloud services once again disappointed the market. It is time to abandon the cloud, which is why Tether built PearPass. PearPass is about to be launched. It is a fully localized open source password manager that does not require cloud services or servers. It only manages keys independently and supports secure storage on devices.

data.title: Tether CEO Criticizes Cloud Services Amid Data Breach
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether's CEO Paolo Ardoino has expressed concerns over a significant data breach involving 16 billion login credentials from major online service providers like Apple, Google, and Facebook. Ardoino criticized cloud services for their repeated failures, suggesting it is time to abandon them. He highlighted this issue as a driving factor behind Tether's development of PearPass, an upcoming open-source password manager. PearPass is designed to operate entirely locally, eliminating the need for cloud services or servers, and allowing users to manage their keys independently while securely storing them on their devices.

data.title: U.S. President Trump to Convene National Security Meeting
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump is scheduled to hold a national security meeting on Friday at 11 a.m. Eastern Time (11 p.m. UTC+8).

data.title: TRX Surpasses DOGE in Cryptocurrency Market Capitalization
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from CoinMarketCap indicates that TRX has overtaken DOGE in terms of market capitalization. TRX's market value is approximately $26.05 billion, while DOGE's stands at around $25.46 billion. This shift places TRX in the eighth position in the cryptocurrency rankings.

data.title: Russia Aims to Regulate Cryptocurrency Mining Industry
data.description: According to PANews, Russian Deputy Finance Minister Ivan Chebeskov stated at the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum that only about 30% of cryptocurrency miners have registered with the Federal Tax Service, achieving compliance. The remaining two-thirds of miners operate in a 'gray area.' Authorities plan to continue advancing the mining registration system to ensure full industry regulation.

data.title: Russian Deputy Finance Minister: Only 30% of miners have completed registration, the industry still needs to be "whitewashed"
data.description: Ivan Chebeskov, deputy minister of the Russian Ministry of Finance, said at the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum that only about 30% of cryptocurrency miners have registered with the Federal Tax Service and achieved compliance. The remaining two-thirds of miners are still in the "gray area", and the authorities will continue to promote the mining registration system and promote the industry's overall "whitewashing". (TASS)

data.title: Qubetics is the Top Crypto to Buy as Presale Enters Final Stage, While AAVE Drops and Kaspa Holds Ground
data.description:
As the crypto market sharpens its focus on real-world utility and decentralized innovation, new contenders are rising to meet evolving user demands. Qubetics ($TICS) has captured widespread attention by merging blockchain with tangible use cases, particularly through its Real World Asset Tokenization Marketplace. With a final presale underway, Qubetics is emerging as a technical achievement.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/qubetics-is-the-top-crypto-to-buy-as-presale-enters-final-stage-while-aave-drops-and-kaspa-holds-ground/

data.title: Jump Crypto publishes a long article after two years: Low-key for several years but still building, still full of enthusiasm for the future of the industry
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Jump Crypto published a long article "Re-introduction to Jump Crypto" on its official website.
Jump Crypto said in the article: "In the past few years, we have maintained a low public exposure, but never stopped building... The reason for publishing this article now is that we believe that now is the best time to build a new financial track and a new coordination layer. This is not only a technical issue, but policies are also catching up. Policymakers and regulators are now open to the potential of the cryptocurrency industry... We are still here, we are still building, and we are still enthusiastic about the future of this industry." Odaily Note: Jump Crypto's last post on the official website dates back to 2023.

data.title: Sui Ecosystem Protocol Momentum TVL exceeds 97 million USD, ranking first on Sui DEX
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News DefiLlama data shows that the TVL of the SUI chain native ve (3,3) DEX protocol Momentum continues to set new highs, breaking through 97 million US dollars. Only 80 days after the protocol was launched, its TVL has jumped to the first place in Sui DEX.

data.title: Economic Observer: CNH stablecoin may be promoted in three stages based on the experience of RMB business pilot
data.description: The Economic Observer published an article titled "How to Break the Hong Kong Trial of Offshore RMB Stablecoins", which pointed out that the Hong Kong Stablecoin Ordinance is expected to be implemented in August, which may indicate that the trial of offshore RMB (CNH) stablecoins is approaching. Referring to the experience of the RMB business pilot in 2003, the implementation of CNH stablecoins can be promoted in three stages: First, sandbox trials (2025-2026): Chinese licensed institutions will pilot the issuance of CNH stablecoins for use in trade scenarios in the Greater Bay Area; Second, regional expansion (2026-2027): access to cross-border projects such as mBridge (Multilateral Central Bank Digital Currency Bridge), while piloting RWA (real world asset) applications such as bond tokenization; Third, global promotion (from 2028): jointly with international organizations such as the IMF (International Monetary Fund) to formulate technical and regulatory standards to promote CNH stablecoins as regional commodity pricing tools. (Economic Observer)

data.title: Massive Data Breach Hits Billions of Logins Across Google, Facebook and GitHub
data.description:
A data breach including over 16 billion passwords has sent a shockwave through the tech world as users scramble to protect themselves.
source: https://decrypt.co/326163/data-breach-hits-billions-logins-google-facebook-github

data.title: USDC Treasury Burns 60 Million Tokens on Ethereum
data.description: According to Foresight News, Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury has destroyed 60 million USDC tokens on the Ethereum blockchain. This action is part of ongoing efforts to manage the supply of the stablecoin and maintain its peg to the U.S. dollar. The destruction of tokens is a common practice in the cryptocurrency industry to ensure stability and control inflation. The move reflects the Treasury's commitment to maintaining the value and integrity of USDC in the market.

data.title: Crypto market reaction to middle east tensions leaves investors on edge
data.description:
20-6-2025 – The cryptocurrency market is weathering a storm of uncertainty, with Bitcoin and Ethereum clinging to stability after a sharp tumble triggered by escalating tensions in the Middle East. Since the Israel-Iran conflict flared on June 3, Bitcoin has slipped 3% to hover around $104,000, while Ethereum has endured a steeper 10% drop, settling [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/crypto-market-reaction-to-middle-east-tensions-leaves-investors-on-edge/
